monster.name: SirAlaric
monster.description: Sir Alaric presents himself as an austere and devout man, with short-cropped gray hair and clear eyes that convey authority. He wears the ceremonial robes of the Keepers of the Balance with a naturalness that inspires trust. His voice is calm, measured — every word seems weighed and just. Beneath the facade, Alaric is a man consumed by ambition. His eyes betray a greed that no prayer can hide, if you know where to look. Distinctive trait: he has a habit of clasping his hands as if in prayer when he speaks — a gesture his followers find reassuring, but which is actually a nervous tic that betrays the calculation behind every word.
